name: Demacia
description_icon: Each time your team loses 25% max Health, Demacians Rally, reducing their Mana cost by 10%. Demacians gain Armor and Magic Resist.
description_detail: smite enemies for 5% of their max Health.

name: Shurima
description_icon:
Each second, Shurimans gain 2% Attack Speed and restore 20 Health. At combat start, they gain additional effects.


Prismatic: Unlock Nasus, Renekton, and Xerath, then field 4 Shurima
description_detail: A Shuriman ascends to GODHOOD every 3 seconds

name: Noxus
description_icon: After the enemy team has lost 15% of their Health, summon Atakhan, Bringer of Ruin. Each Noxian champion's star level increases his power.
description_detail: Noxians get more powerful the longer he is alive.
He drains the souls of enemies on cast.

name: Bilgewater
description_icon: Each player combat, gain Silver Serpents (
TFT16_Bilgewater_scaleSerpents.png
), plus 1 additional for each Bilgewater takedown.
Silver Serpents can be spent in the Black Market to grant Bilgewater champions bonus stats and special loot. Higher tiers unlock rarer loot.

name: Yordle
description_detail: Yordles gain 40 Health and 5% Attack Speed for each unique Yordle fielded. 3 star Yordles grant 100% more!
AND your first shop each round has a Yordle in it!
AND get 1 free rerolls each round!
AND get a Yordle Grab Bag each round!

name: Ionia
description_icon: Ionians gain Shield, Attack Damage, and Ability Power. Each game, they walk a different path.
description_detail: Gain a benefit that changes each game
Gain a benefit that changes each game
Gain a benefit that changes each game

name: Darkin
description_detail: AND you heal for 25% of the player damage you deal.
they deal 333 magic damage to the 2 closest enemies.

name: Riftscourge
description_icon: Baron Nashor takes up 2 team slots and grants +2 to the Void trait.

name: Void
description_icon: Gain Mutations that only Void champions can use. Void champions gain Attack Speed.

name: Shurima
description_icon:
Each second, Shurimans gain 2% Attack Speed and restore 20 Health. At combat start, they gain additional effects.


Prismatic: Unlock Nasus, Renekton, and Xerath, then field 4 Shurima
description_detail: A Shuriman ascends to GODHOOD every 3 seconds

name: Freljord
description_icon:
Summon a Frozen Tower. Allies in front of it gain Health and allies behind it gain Damage Amp.


Freljordians gain 150% more.
description_detail: Towers stun enemies on death for 1.5 seconds. 16%

name: Chainbreaker
description_icon: Sylas rotates between 3 different Abilities, depending on which one is most useful at the moment. He cannot cast the same one twice in a row.

name: Bruiser
description_icon: Your team gains 150 maximum Health. Bruisers gain more.

name: Immortal
description_icon: While Xin Zhao is not on your board, Zaahen gains the Ionia, Demacia, and Warden traits.

name: Dragonguards
description_icon: When Jarvan casts, Shyvana gains 100% of the Shield. When Shyvana casts, Jarvan jumps in and deals 100/120/140/175% of his Armor and Magic Resist as magic damage in a 2-hex radius.

name: Longshot
description_icon: Longshots gain Damage Amp and deal more damage to targets farther away.

name: Darkin
description_detail: AND you heal for 25% of the player damage you deal.
they deal 333 magic damage to the 2 closest enemies.

name: Vanquisher
description_icon: Vanquishers' abilities can critically strike. They also gain Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage.

name: Warden
description_icon: When Wardens first drop below 75% and 25% Health, they gain a Shield based on their max Health.

name: Harvester
description_icon: Each time an enemy champion dies, gain 10 Mana. Casting abilities does not consume Mana.

name: Longshot
description_icon: Longshots gain Damage Amp and deal more damage to targets farther away.

name: Eternal
description_icon: Every 3rd attack from Kindred on the same enemy deals 325% damage, as Wolf mauls their target.

name: Quickstriker
description_icon: Your team gains 15% Attack Speed. Quickstrikers gain bonus Attack Speed based on their target's missing Health.

name: Vanquisher
description_icon: Vanquishers' abilities can critically strike. They also gain Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage.

name: Vanquisher
description_icon: Vanquishers' abilities can critically strike. They also gain Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage.

name: Ascendant
description_icon: After each combat, an Ascendant Charm appears in your shop. These are powerful effects that can be bought for gold.?

name: Dragonborn
description_icon: On cast, Shyvana replaces her spell with Flame Breath. While transformed, all allies take 8% less damage from enemy Abilities.

description_icon: Juggernauts gain Durability, increased while above 50% health. When a Juggernaut dies, other Juggernauts heal for 5% of their max Health.

description_icon: Vanquishers' abilities can critically strike. They also gain Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage.

name: Shadow Isles
description_icon: Whenever ANY champion dies in a player combat, gain Souls (

). Shadow Isles champions' Abilities are uniquely empowered based on the number of Souls you have.
Shadow Isles champions gain Attack Damage and Ability Power.

name: Soulbound
description_icon: Lucian and Senna fight together, swapping when either casts. Each champion has a unique ability.

name: Arcanist
description_icon: Your team gains Ability Power, Arcanists gain more.

name: Disruptor
description_icon: Disruptors' abilities Dazzle enemies hit. Disruptors deal bonus damage to Dazzled enemies.

name: Rune Mage
description_icon: The Rune Mage benefits from all active Region traits, but contributes to none.

name: Quickstriker
description_icon: Your team gains 15% Attack Speed. Quickstrikers gain bonus Attack Speed based on their target's missing Health.

name: Chronokeeper
description_icon:
Every 2 casts, the Chronokeeper stores 1 XP. If he has enough stored for you to level up, he transfers you the required XP.


If you are level 10, he instead gains 15% Damage Amp.


Stored XP: ?

name: Invoker
description_icon: Your team gains 1 Mana Regen. Invokers gain more Mana from all sources.

description_icon: Disruptors' abilities Dazzle enemies hit. Disruptors deal bonus damage to Dazzled enemies.

name: World Ender
description_icon: Aatrox gains Attack Damage equal to ?% of his Omnivamp.

name: Zaun
description_icon:
After 4 seconds, Zaunites become Shimmer-Fused, granting them 15% Durability and 90% decaying Attack Speed for 4 seconds.


After a short cooldown, they become Shimmer-Fused again.
description_detail: Zaunites restore 30% Health over 3 seconds and instantly become Shimmer-Fused.
Shimmer-Fused bonuses are increased by 50%. Refresh after 3 seconds instead.

name: Chosen Wolves
description_icon: When Kindred casts, Ambessa always gains their protection against death and gains 40% Attack Damage while protected.

name: Blacksmith

Each item he is equipped with grants him 350/600/2000 max Health. Artifacts grant 300% more.

name: Glutton
description_icon:
Once per Planning phase, you can feed Tahm Kench a champion, permanently granting him either Health, Attack Speed, or Ability Power based on their role and star level.


To feed, hold an ally from the bench over Tahm Kench until his mouth opens, then release.
